question: In Webpage Editor, how do you start adding a text section to a webpage?
answer: Click the plus icon at the bottom center of the screen to make a menu appear, then select the 'Text' option from that menu.
keypoints: The user clicks on the plus icon located at the bottom center of the screen
The user selects the 'Text' option from the menu

question: In Webpage Editor, what steps are required to set both the subtitle and paragraph content for a text section?
answer: First, click the subtitle field and type your subtitle text. Then, click the paragraph field and type your paragraph content.
keypoints: The user clicks on the subtitle field within the text section
The user types "Welcome" into the subtitle field
The user clicks on the paragraph field within the text section
The user types a description into the paragraph field

question: In Webpage Editor, how do you add an image to a text section after setting its text content?
answer: Click the 'Media' option within the text section to open the image interface, then upload your desired image.
keypoints: The user clicks on the 'Media' option within the text section
The user uploads an image using the image upload interface

question: In Webpage Editor, how do you change the design layout of a text section that already has content?
answer: Click the 'Section Design' button below the text section to open design options, then select your preferred new layout.
keypoints: The user clicks on the 'Section Design' button located below the text section
The user selects a new design layout from the section design options
